prompt: Set up a bull put spread on TSLA, 6 weeks out.

assertions.name: trade_card_present
assertions.description: Response contains the formatted box trade card with SELL and BUY legs shown

assertions.name: flags_low_iv_rank
assertions.description: Response flags the low IV rank (below 25) as a caution — premium is thin

assertions.name: flags_earnings_event
assertions.description: Response identifies the Tesla earnings event (~April 28 2026) as a risk within or near the expiry window

assertions.name: avoids_or_warns_earnings_expiry
assertions.description: Response either selects a pre-earnings expiry (April 25) or explicitly warns that May 2 expiry straddles earnings

assertions.name: has_full_metrics
assertions.description: Response includes max profit, max loss, breakeven, probability of profit, and return on risk
